result.evidence_summary: The Šumava ski marathon (also called Šumavský skimaraton) is listed on VisitCzechia with a 2026 date and links to skisumava.cz, confirmed as an Euroloppet event with detailed track info and history in Kvilda, Šumava National Park. The official site skisumava.cz organizes related events and hosts the race. No direct race results found in snippets, but multiple independent listings including Euroloppet passport verify it as a real, recurring organized event.
